mapper.insert: INSERT INTO chat_session ( thread_id, user_id, title, status ) VALUES ( #{threadId}, #{userId}, #{title}, #{status} )
mapper.select: SELECT id, thread_id, user_id, title, status, created_at, updated_at, last_message_at FROM chat_session WHERE thread_id = #{threadId} AND user_id = #{userId} AND status = 'active'

SELECT id, thread_id, user_id, title, status, created_at, updated_at, last_message_at FROM chat_session WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status = 'active' ORDER BY COALESCE(last_message_at, created_at) DESC, id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO chat_message ( session_id, user_id, role, content, message_status, request_id ) VALUES ( #{sessionId}, #{userId}, #{role}, #{content}, #{messageStatus}, #{requestId} )
mapper.select: SELECT id, session_id, user_id, role, content, message_status, request_id, created_at FROM chat_message WHERE session_id = #{sessionId} ORDER BY created_at ASC, id ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE chat_session SET last_message_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(6), updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(6) WHERE id = #{sessionId}
